_template.note: Copy this file to scraper/pricing/config.json and replace all TODO values with market-specific data.
_template.reference: See Germany config.json for a complete working example.

pricing_scope.price_definition: TODO: What does the price represent? (e.g. 'equipment_only_installer_to_customer_range')

base_capacity_matrix._todo: Research local B-tier monoblock prices for 4-6 kW range
Research local B-tier monoblock prices for 6-8 kW range
Research local B-tier monoblock prices for 8-10 kW range
Research local B-tier monoblock prices for 10-12 kW range
Research local B-tier monoblock prices for 12-16 kW range
Research local B-tier monoblock prices for 16-20 kW range
Research local B-tier monoblock prices for 20+ kW range

sub_4kw_rule.note: Units below 4kW use the 4-6 band with a discount

brand_tiers._note: Tier multipliers applied to base capacity prices. B-tier is baseline (0%). Adjust percentages based on local market price stratification.

refrigerant_adjustments._note: Likely similar across EU markets due to F-Gas regulation. Adjust for non-EU markets.

performance_adjustments._note: Reusable as-is; SCOP/noise premiums are physics-based. Thresholds computed from dataset population.

package_scope_confidence._note: Reusable as-is; scope uncertainty is universal.
